zh.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Derinstone於1212年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓時，她的父親Bryan de Derinstone32歲，母親Felicia de Throckmorton36歲。她於1231年之前與Adam de Throckmerton在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1260年在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Derinstone于1212年出生在英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓时，她的父亲Bryan de Derinstone32岁，母亲Felicia de Throckmorton36岁。她于1231年之前与Adam de Throckmerton在英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1260年在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Derinstone was born in 1212, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, her father, Bryan de Derinstone, was 32 and her mother, Felicia de Throckmorton, was 36. She married Adam de Throckmerton before 1231, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1260, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Derinstone est née en 1212, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Bryan de Derinstone, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Felicia de Throckmorton, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Throckmerton avant 1231, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1260, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Derinstone 1212 in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bryan de Derinstone 32 und ihre Mutter Felicia de Throckmorton 36. Sie hat vor 1231 in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England Adam de Throckmerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Derinstone è nata il nel 1212 nel Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Bryan de Derinstone, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Felicia de Throckmorton, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Throckmerton prima del 1231, nel Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1260, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Derinstoneが1212年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンで生まれた時，父Bryan de Derinstoneは32歳，母Felicia de Throckmortonは36歳であった。1231年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンでAdam de Throckmertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1260年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Derinstone(이)가 1212년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bryan de Derinstone(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Felicia de Throckmorton(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1231년 이전 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 Adam de Throckmerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Derinstone nasceu em 1212, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bryan de Derinstone, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Felicia de Throckmorton, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Throckmerton antes 1231, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1260, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Derinstone родилась в 1212 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bryan de Derinstone было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Felicia de Throckmorton, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Throckmerton перед 1231 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1260 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Derinstone nació en 1212, en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bryan de Derinstone, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Felicia de Throckmorton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Adam de Throckmerton antes de 1231, en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1260, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
